Description: Application portal must allow document upload at submission
Acceptance Criterion: Documents uploaded at submission reduce collection time by at least 60%

Description: Credit bureau pull must be automated on submission not manual
Acceptance Criterion: Credit report available within 30 minutes of submission automatically

Description: Analyst assignment must happen within 2 business hours of initial review completion
Acceptance Criterion: Queue wait time below 2 hours for 95% of applications

Description: Manager sign-off queue must have a maximum 4-hour SLA
Acceptance Criterion: Manager review initiated within 4 hours for all applications

Description: Applicant must receive automated status updates at each process stage
Acceptance Criterion: Automated notification sent within 1 hour of each stage completion

Description: Self-employed applicants must receive a document checklist at submission
Acceptance Criterion: Checklist reduces incomplete document rate by 40% within 90 days

Description: System must flag applications exceeding 3 business days for escalation
Acceptance Criterion: 100% of delayed applications flagged and escalated within 30 minutes of breach

Description: Compliance check must run in parallel with manager approval not sequentially
Acceptance Criterion: Parallel processing reduces total process time by estimated 1.5 business days

Description: Underwriting decision must be documented in the system before manager review
Acceptance Criterion: 100% of applications have underwriting notes before entering manager queue

Description: Dashboard showing real-time application pipeline by stage available to branch managers
Acceptance Criterion: Dashboard updated every 15 minutes showing applications by stage and aging

Description: Automated income verification for salaried employees via payroll integration
Acceptance Criterion: Payroll integration reduces document collection time by 50% for salaried applicants

Description: Mobile-friendly application portal for document submission
Acceptance Criterion: Mobile submission rate above 40% within 6 months of launch

Description: Standard decision letter templates for all three outcomes
Acceptance Criterion: Communication step reduced to under 30 minutes for all decisions

Description: Analyst workload balancing — maximum 15 active applications per analyst
Acceptance Criterion: No analyst carries more than 15 active files at any time

Description: Post-decision feedback survey sent to all applicants within 24 hours
